messages.content: What are the catchy names of the episodes of a fictional TV show called "Choose your Dystopia!"

1. "The Beginning of the End"
2. "A Brave New World"
3. "The Road to Ruin"
4. "The Last Bastion"
5. "The Twilight of Humanity"
6. "The Edge of Collapse"
7. "The Final Showdown"
8. "The Last Hope"
9. "The Dawn of a New Era"
10. "The Endgame"
What are the catchy names of the episodes of a fictional TV show called “Choose your Dystopia!” for each type of apocalypse seen in movies!

Zombie Apocalypse:
1. "The Infection Begins"
2. "Surviving the Dead"
3. "The Endless Horde"
4. "The Last Safe Haven"
5. "Battling the Undead"

8. "The Cure and the Curse"
9. "The New World Order"
10. "The Future is Undead"
